subcodes.first_line: O Lord! O Bestower of bounties, Unveiler of mysteries, Enricher of the poor, Strengthener of the weak, and Quickener of mouldering bones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا واهب العطاء و کاشف الغطاء و مغنی الفقراء و مثری الضعفاء و محیی الرمم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
